# CWE-1333 safe: linear-time tag validation
lang: go
file: CWE-1333-safe.go
---
package sample

// CWE-1333 mitigated: simple anchored pattern and length cap prevent ReDoS.

import (
	"net/http"
	"regexp"
	"unicode"

	"github.com/gin-gonic/gin"
	"gorm.io/gorm"
)

var safeTagPattern = regexp.MustCompile(`^[a-zA-Z]{1,32}$`)

type Comment struct {
	ID  uint
	Tag string
}

func ValidateCommentTagSafe(db *gorm.DB) gin.HandlerFunc {
	return func(c *gin.Context) {
		tag := c.PostForm("tag")
		if len(tag) > 32 {
			c.JSON(http.StatusBadRequest, gin.H{"error": "tag too long"})
			return
		}
		for _, r := range tag {
			if !unicode.IsLetter(r) {
				c.JSON(http.StatusBadRequest, gin.H{"error": "invalid tag"})
				return
			}
		}
		if !safeTagPattern.MatchString(tag) {
			c.JSON(http.StatusBadRequest, gin.H{"error": "invalid tag"})
			return
		}
		rec := Comment{Tag: tag}
		if err := db.Create(&rec).Error; err != nil {
			c.JSON(http.StatusInternalServerError, gin.H{"error": err.Error()})
			return
		}
		c.JSON(http.StatusCreated, gin.H{"id": rec.ID})
	}
}
